headline: Utilities Are Wartime Havens. 4 Stocks With High Dividend Yields and Growth.
summary: One reason for utilities’ success is investors appear to be gravitating toward defensive, hard-asset stocks.

headline: Ladenburg Thalmann Downgrades Public Service Enterprise to Neutral, Lowers Price Target to $84.5
summary: Ladenburg Thalmann  analyst Paul Fremont   downgrades Public Service Enterprise (NYSE:PEG) from Buy to Neutral and lowers the price target from $87.5 to $84.5.
